title: Code of Conduct
text: project follows Contributor Covenant Code Conduct. Participants expected respectful, constructive, focused making reliable scientific software. Unacceptable behavior includes harassment, personal attacks, disruption project spaces. Report concerns package maintainer listed DESCRIPTION.

title: Contributing
text: Thanks helping improve bluertopo. Please keep contributions inside package’s narrow scope: discovering, downloading, verifying, opening NOAA BlueTopo assets terra. opening pull request: Run devtools::document(). Run devtools::test(). Run devtools::check(args = "---cran") possible. Keep normal tests network-free. add features imply navigation fitness, vertical-datum conversion, terrain derivatives, interpolation, permanent mosaics, non-BlueTopo data products.

title: Downloads, Cache, and Reproducibility
text: Dry runs return planned assets without creating destination directory.
code: plan <- bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path = "data/raw/bluetopo",   coverage = "fill",   dry_run = TRUE )

title: Downloads, Cache, and Reproducibility
text: row records tile identifier, asset type, source URL, destination path, verification status, SHA-256 value, attempts, timestamps. fixed manifest written download root convenience, query-addressed manifest copies written manifests/ query hash available.
code: manifest <- bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path = "data/raw/bluetopo",   rat = TRUE,   verify = "sha256",   on_exists = "verify" )

title: Downloads, Cache, and Reproducibility
text: on_exists = "verify" reuses existing file verification succeeds. on_exists = "skip" records skipped file without verification. on_exists = "replace" redownloads asset.
code: reused <- bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path = "data/raw/bluetopo",   on_exists = "verify" )

title: Downloads, Cache, and Reproducibility
text: bluertopo() uses package cache catalog files, downloaded source assets, VRTs. Cache roots marked .bluertopo-cache.json package-owned content written. bluertopo_cache_clear() clears configured package cache. refuses unmarked directories, suspicious roots, symlinked cache paths.
code: bluertopo_cache_dir() bluertopo_cache_clear(confirm = TRUE)

title: Downloads, Cache, and Reproducibility
text: Downloads currently deterministic single-worker. workers = NULL workers = 1 accepted; higher values rejected bounded parallel downloads implemented. Individual assets still use retry/backoff behavior transient transfer failures.
code: manifest <- bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path = "data/raw/bluetopo",   workers = 1,   retries = 3 )

title: Get BlueTopo
text: Use terra::SpatVector, sf object, bbox vector, WKT string, GeoJSON string, local vector file path. Remote AOI URLs intentionally refused.
code: library(bluertopo) library(terra)  aoi <- vect("project_area.gpkg")  # Or a bbox: c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax) in EPSG:4326. aoi <- c(-66.2, 18.2, -66.1, 18.3)

title: Get BlueTopo
text: Inspect tile choices downloading large GeoTIFFs.
code: tiles <- bluertopo_tiles(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   coverage = "warn" )  as.data.frame(tiles)[   c("tile_id", "resolution_m", "delivered_date", "selection_reason") ]

title: Get BlueTopo
text: default, bluertopo() downloads original NOAA assets package cache, verifies SHA-256 checksums, opens elevation band. Set details = TRUE provenance matters. result includes selected tiles, download statuses, query metadata, coverage diagnostics, catalog provenance.
code: bathy <- bluertopo(   aoi,   layers = "elevation",   resolution = "native",   coverage = "warn",   details = TRUE )  bathy$data bathy$downloads bathy$coverage

title: Get BlueTopo
text: BlueTopo source GeoTIFFs currently expose elevation, vertical uncertainty, contributor/source identifier bands.
code: all_layers <- bluertopo(   aoi,   layers = "all",   coverage = "fill" )

title: Get BlueTopo
text: Native BlueTopo tiles may differ CRS, resolution, origin, alignment. selected source grids incompatible, bluertopo() returns terra::SpatRasterCollection rather silently resampling. Request single output grid resampling intentional analytical choice.
code: bathy_10m <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   output_crs = "EPSG:26918",   output_resolution = 10,   combine = "single" )

title: Layers, Contributor Values, and RAT Metadata
code: elevation <- bluertopo(   aoi,   layers = "elevation" )

title: Layers, Contributor Values, and RAT Metadata
text: contributor band contains numeric identifiers. Interpret identifiers NOAA RAT sidecar metadata source documentation. bluertopo can download RAT sidecars original assets, currently normalize contributor tables package-level lookup. NOAA’s BlueTopo product page package’s primary external reference: https://nauticalcharts.noaa.gov/data/bluetopo.html.
code: all_layers <- bluertopo(   aoi,   layers = "all",   details = TRUE )  names(all_layers$data) assets <- bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path = "data/raw/bluetopo",   rat = TRUE )  subset(assets, asset_type == "rat")

title: Layers, Contributor Values, and RAT Metadata
text: bluertopo(details = TRUE) includes vertical-reference text discovered terra/GDAL metadata inspection available. provenance text, datum conversion. Use domain-appropriate vertical-datum transformation outside bluertopo analysis requires one.
code: result <- bluertopo(aoi, details = TRUE) result$provenance$vertical_reference_text result$provenance$no_vertical_datum_conversion_performed

title: Mixed UTM Zones and terra Collections
text: selected rasters share compatible grid, result single terra::SpatRaster. grids differ, result terra::SpatRasterCollection stable collection names derived grid metadata.
code: native <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   coverage = "fill",   combine = "auto" ) class(native)

title: Mixed UTM Zones and terra Collections
text: Use combine = "collection" downstream code always receive collection, even single compatible grid.
code: collection <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   combine = "collection" )

title: Mixed UTM Zones and terra Collections
text: Use combine = "single" together output_crs output_resolution analysis requires one grid. explicit resampling reported warning. Geographic target resolutions rejected release degree-based cell sizes ambiguous bathymetric analysis. Use projected CRS explicit output grids.
code: single <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   output_crs = "EPSG:26918",   output_resolution = 10,   combine = "single",   resampling = c(     elevation = "bilinear",     uncertainty = "bilinear",     contributor = "near"   ) )

title: Resolution Policies
code: # Use every intersecting native source resolution. bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "native")  # Prefer the finest available native source tiles. bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "finest")  # Prefer the coarsest available native source tiles. bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "coarsest")  # Keep all available resolutions as candidates. bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "best_available")

title: Resolution Policies
text: Numeric resolution values request exact native meter values. Use bluertopo_resolution() explicit nearest-neighbor behavior.
code: bluertopo(aoi, resolution = 8)  bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = bluertopo_resolution(     "nearest",     value = 10,     tie = "finer"   ) )

title: Resolution Policies
text: n must positive whole number. Fractional values rejected rather silently truncated.
code: bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = bluertopo_resolution("between", min_m = 4, max_m = 16) )  bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = bluertopo_resolution("finest_n", n = 2) )

title: Resolution Policies
text: Coverage diagnostics compare selected tile coverage published tile coverage intersecting AOI. coverage = "fill" adds fallback native resolutions target met fallback remains. strategy = "coverage", coverage target stored resolution policy used. strategies, function-level min_coverage argument used.
code: bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = "finest",   coverage = "fill",   min_coverage = 0.95 )  policy <- bluertopo_resolution(   "coverage",   prefer = "finest",   min_coverage = 0.90 )  bluertopo(aoi, resolution = policy, coverage = "fill")

title: Resolution Policies
text: global resolution ranking currently implemented. scope = "local" reserved future AOI-local ranking implementation rejected release instead accepted without effect.

title: Authors and Citation

title: Authors and Citation
text: Cordero E (2026). bluertopo: Download extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry terra. R package version 0.0.1, https://el-cordero.github.io/bluer-topo/. NOAA (2026). “BlueTopo.” https://nauticalcharts.noaa.gov/data/bluetopo.html.
code: @Manual{,   title = {bluertopo: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry with terra},   author = {Elvin Cordero},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://el-cordero.github.io/bluer-topo/}, } @Misc{,   title = {BlueTopo},   author = {{NOAA}},   year = {2026},   url = {https://nauticalcharts.noaa.gov/data/bluetopo.html}, }

title: bluertopo
text: bluertopo discovers, downloads, verifies, opens NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry area interest using terra. package keeps source GeoTIFF RAT sidecar files intact default, records query catalog provenance, makes native source-resolution choices explicit. BlueTopo navigation. package performs vertical-datum conversion affiliated , endorsed , supported NOAA.

title: bluertopo
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("el-cordero/bluer-topo")

title: bluertopo
code: library(bluertopo) library(terra)  aoi <- vect("my_area.gpkg")  bathy <- bluertopo(   aoi,   layers = "elevation",   resolution = "native",   coverage = "warn",   details = TRUE )  bathy$data bathy$tiles bathy$provenance

title: bluertopo
text: Use bluertopo_download() durable deliverable original NOAA GeoTIFF plus optional RAT sidecars rather extracted raster object. verify = "sha256" default requires NOAA-provided checksums. verify = "none" available explicitly unverified workflows. verify = "size" rejected unless trustworthy expected byte counts available transfer starts.
code: files <- bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path = "data/bluetopo",   rat = TRUE,   verify = "sha256",   coverage = "fill" )

title: bluertopo
text: resolution filters NOAA BlueTopo source tiles native cell size. Smaller meter values mean finer native source detail. output_resolution requests explicit output grid therefore resamples output.
code: # Exact native resolution bathy_8m <- bluertopo(aoi, resolution = 8)  # Highest native detail, with lower-resolution fallback for coverage bathy_best <- bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "finest", coverage = "fill")  # Lowest native detail bathy_low <- bluertopo(aoi, resolution = "coarsest")  # Closest available native resolution to 10 m bathy_near <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = bluertopo_resolution("nearest", value = 10, tie = "finer") )  # Keep source tiles from 4 through 16 m bathy_range <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = bluertopo_resolution("between", min_m = 4, max_m = 16) )

title: bluertopo
text: Native BlueTopo tiles can span multiple UTM zones, resolutions, grid alignments. selected source files compatible, bluertopo() returns terra::SpatRasterCollection unless user explicitly requests output grid.
code: bathy_10m <- bluertopo(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   output_crs = "EPSG:26918",   output_resolution = 10,   combine = "single" )

title: bluertopo
text: Package cache operations intentionally conservative. bluertopo_cache_clear() clears configured bluertopo cache, requires confirmation noninteractive sessions, refuses remove content unless package-owned cache marker present.
code: bluertopo_cache_dir() bluertopo_cache_clear(confirm = TRUE)

what: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry — bluertopo
title: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry — bluertopo
text: bluertopo() main extraction workflow. discovers BlueTopo tiles AOI, downloads verified original source assets default, opens selected bands lazy, file-backed terra objects.

title: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry — bluertopo
code: bluertopo(   aoi,   layers = "elevation",   resolution = "native",   coverage = "warn",   min_coverage = 1,   access = "download",   cache_dir = bluertopo_cache_dir(),   refresh = "if_stale",   crop = TRUE,   mask = FALSE,   combine = "auto",   output_crs = NULL,   output_resolution = NULL,   resampling = NULL,   verify = "sha256",   workers = NULL,   progress = interactive(),   quiet = FALSE,   details = FALSE )

title: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry — bluertopo
text: aoi Area interest. layers "elevation", "uncertainty", "contributor", "", character vector canonical layer names. resolution Native source-resolution policy. coverage Coverage policy. min_coverage Target share published tile coverage. access "download" opt-"stream". cache_dir Package cache directory. refresh Catalog refresh policy. crop Crop result AOI extent. mask Mask result AOI polygon. Implies crop = TRUE. combine "auto", "collection", "single". output_crs Optional explicit output CRS. output_resolution Optional explicit output-grid resolution target CRS units. resampling Optional named resampling methods layer. verify Download verification mode. workers Worker count. NULL/1 currently supported; higher values rejected bounded parallel downloads implemented. progress Show routine progress messages. quiet Suppress routine messages. details Return bluertopo_result instead terra object.

title: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry — bluertopo
text: terra::SpatRaster, terra::SpatRasterCollection, bluertopo_result details = TRUE.

title: Download and extract NOAA BlueTopo bathymetry — bluertopo
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ bathy <- bluertopo(c(-66.2, 18.2, -66.1, 18.3)) } # }

text: Deletes configured bluertopo package cache path safeguards.

title: Clear package-owned cache content — bluertopo_cache_clear
code: bluertopo_cache_clear(   cache_dir = bluertopo_cache_dir(),   confirm = interactive() )

title: Clear package-owned cache content — bluertopo_cache_clear
text: cache_dir Cache directory clear. confirm Required TRUE noninteractive sessions.

title: Clear package-owned cache content — bluertopo_cache_clear
text: data frame summary removed file count bytes.

text: Returns configured package cache directory without creating .

code: bluertopo_cache_dir()

text: single character string.

code: bluertopo_cache_dir() #> [1] "/Users/ec/Library/Caches/org.R-project.R/R/bluertopo"

what: Download original NOAA BlueTopo assets for an AOI — bluertopo_download
title: Download original NOAA BlueTopo assets for an AOI — bluertopo_download
text: Discovers selected BlueTopo tiles, downloads original GeoTIFF files optional RAT sidecars, verifies , writes download manifests.

title: Download original NOAA BlueTopo assets for an AOI — bluertopo_download
code: bluertopo_download(   aoi,   path,   resolution = "native",   coverage = "warn",   min_coverage = 1,   rat = TRUE,   refresh = "if_stale",   verify = "sha256",   workers = NULL,   on_exists = "verify",   on_error = "stop",   retries = 3,   timeout = NULL,   dry_run = FALSE,   progress = interactive(),   quiet = FALSE )

title: Download original NOAA BlueTopo assets for an AOI — bluertopo_download
text: aoi Area interest. path Destination directory original source assets. resolution Native source-resolution policy. coverage Coverage policy. min_coverage Target share published tile coverage. rat Download RAT sidecars available. refresh Catalog refresh policy. verify Verification mode: "sha256", "size", "none". workers Worker count. NULL/1 currently supported; higher values rejected bounded parallel downloads implemented. on_exists Existing-file policy: "verify", "skip", "replace". on_error Error policy: "stop" "continue". retries Number download attempts asset. timeout Optional curl timeout seconds. dry_run Return plan without writing tile files. progress Show routine progress messages. quiet Suppress routine messages.

title: Download original NOAA BlueTopo assets for an AOI — bluertopo_download
text: bluertopo_downloads data frame.

title: Download original NOAA BlueTopo assets for an AOI — bluertopo_download
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ bluertopo_download(c(-66.2, 18.2, -66.1, 18.3), path = "data/bluetopo") } # }

what: Construct a BlueTopo native-resolution policy — bluertopo_resolution
title: Construct a BlueTopo native-resolution policy — bluertopo_resolution
text: bluertopo_resolution() creates explicit native source-tile selection policy. Smaller meter values finer source resolution. object never requests output resampling; use output_resolution bluertopo() explicit output grid.

title: Construct a BlueTopo native-resolution policy — bluertopo_resolution
code: bluertopo_resolution(   strategy,   value = NULL,   values = NULL,   min_m = NULL,   max_m = NULL,   n = NULL,   scope = "global",   tie = "finer",   prefer = "finest",   strict = TRUE,   min_coverage = 1 )

title: Construct a BlueTopo native-resolution policy — bluertopo_resolution
text: strategy Resolution strategy. value single meter value used target-like strategies. values One exact meter values. min_m, max_m Inclusive meter bounds. n Rank count rank-based strategies. scope "global". "local" reserved future AOI-local ranking implementation rejected release. tie Tie preference nearest/target strategies. prefer Preference direction coverage/rank strategies. strict Whether fallback must remain inside hard constraints. min_coverage Coverage target coverage-oriented strategies.

title: Construct a BlueTopo native-resolution policy — bluertopo_resolution
text: bluertopo_resolution S3 object.

title: Construct a BlueTopo native-resolution policy — bluertopo_resolution
code: bluertopo_resolution("nearest", value = 10, tie = "finer") #> <bluertopo_resolution> #>   strategy: nearest  #>   value: 10 m #>   scope: global  #>   strict: TRUE  bluertopo_resolution("between", min_m = 4, max_m = 16) #> <bluertopo_resolution> #>   strategy: between  #>   bounds: 4 to 16 m #>   scope: global  #>   strict: TRUE

what: Discover BlueTopo tiles intersecting an AOI — bluertopo_tiles
title: Discover BlueTopo tiles intersecting an AOI — bluertopo_tiles
text: Returns selected NOAA BlueTopo tile footprints standardized metadata without downloading raster assets.

title: Discover BlueTopo tiles intersecting an AOI — bluertopo_tiles
code: bluertopo_tiles(   aoi,   resolution = "native",   coverage = "warn",   min_coverage = 1,   cache_dir = bluertopo_cache_dir(),   refresh = "if_stale",   quiet = FALSE )

title: Discover BlueTopo tiles intersecting an AOI — bluertopo_tiles
text: aoi Area interest. resolution Native source-resolution policy. coverage Coverage policy: "ignore", "warn", "error", "fill". min_coverage Target share published tile coverage. cache_dir Package cache directory. refresh Catalog refresh policy. quiet Suppress routine messages.

title: Discover BlueTopo tiles intersecting an AOI — bluertopo_tiles
text: terra::SpatVector selected tile metadata. Coverage diagnostics attached attribute.

title: Discover BlueTopo tiles intersecting an AOI — bluertopo_tiles
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ tiles <- bluertopo_tiles(c(-66.2, 18.2, -66.1, 18.3)) } # }

title: bluertopo 0.0.1
text: Initial package scaffold NOAA BlueTopo catalog discovery, native resolution selection, original-file download, terra-backed extraction, cache management, fixtures, tests, documentation.
